lightsail.instance.autosnapshotaddon.Cfn: `AutoSnapshotAddOn` is a property of the [AddOn](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-lightsail-instance-addon.html) property. It describes the automatic snapshot add-on for an instance.

lightsail.instance.autosnapshotaddon.Sna.Description: The daily time when an automatic snapshot will be created.  Constraints:  + Must be in `HH:00` format, and in an hourly increment.+ Specified in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC).+ The snapshot will be automatically created between the time specified and up to 45 minutes after.
